name: Ricotta Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat ricotta until smooth. Gradually add 1 1/2 cups sugar and egg yolks, beating after each addition.
2. Add flour, lemon rind, and vanilla to the mixture. Mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with 1/2 cup sugar until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the whipped cream and egg whites into the ricotta mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and graham cracker-crumb-lined 12-inch spring form pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F for 10 minutes, then lower the temperature to 350°F and bake for an additional 1 hour.
7. Turn off the heat and allow the cake to cool in the oven with the door closed.
8. Store in the refrigerator. Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
